Short Form Content Strategist CSM

  • Skyray Ventures - 2.2
  • Remote

  • Quick Apply

Job Details

  • Part-time | Full-time
  • $1,500 - $2,500 a month
  • 11 days ago

Qualifications

  • Script writing
  • Increasing user engagement
  • Customer relationship building
  • YouTube
  • Client onboarding
  • System design
  • Client management
  • Brand storytelling
  • Scriptwriting for video production
  • Strategic consulting
  • Data-driven problem-solving
  • TikTok
  • Increasing social media audience engagement
  • Instagram
  • Leadership
  • Content strategy alignment

Full Job Description

Senior Short-Form Growth Strategist

Location: Remote

Work Type: Part-Time / Full-Time

Role Overview

  • We are looking for a client-facing Senior Short-Form Growth Strategist to architect scalable viral content systems and drive measurable growth for high-value clients.
  • This role goes far beyond content posting or basic social media management. The ideal candidate will design strategic frameworks for short-form content growth, lead client relationships, and build structured content roadmaps that consistently generate high-performing content across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
  • You will work directly with clients to understand their goals, develop 90–180 day growth strategies, and oversee the execution of content systems designed to generate large-scale reach and engagement.

Summary:

The successful candidate will operate as a strategic advisor to clients, designing and managing systems that drive viral content performance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement short-form content growth strategies for clients
  • Build structured 90–180 day content roadmaps aligned with growth objectives
  • Architect scalable viral content systems and distribution strategies
  • Write and refine high-performing short-form scripts, hooks, and storytelling frameworks
  • Lead client onboarding calls and weekly strategy meetings
  • Analyze content performance and continuously refine strategy to maximize reach and engagement
  • Guide clients and internal teams on content direction, creative strategy, and growth opportunities
  • Identify trends and platform shifts to maintain a competitive growth advantage

Required Experience

Candidates must have:

  • 3–8 years of relevant experience in content strategy, growth strategy, or creative strategy
  • Direct client-facing experience in an agency or consulting environment
  • Experience leading client onboarding and weekly strategy calls
  • Proven experience building 90–180 day content strategies or growth roadmaps
  • Strong expertise in short-form storytelling, scripting, and viral hooks
  • Demonstrated examples of content achieving 1M+ views
  • Excellent verbal communication and presentation skills
  • Candidates must be able to show clear proof of performance results.

Preferred Background

  • We are particularly interested in professionals who have worked as:
  • Senior Content Strategist
  • Short-Form Growth Strategist
  • Creative Strategist (Social Media)
  • Head of Content at an agency
  • Growth Manager for influencers or brands
  • Client Success Manager at a creator or influencer agency

Nice to Have (Not Mandatory)

  • Experience managing clipping campaigns
  • Experience working with UGC creators or clipper networks
  • Experience designing payout systems and submission workflows
  • Experience building creator amplification systems
  • Clipping experience is beneficial, but strategic growth expertise is the priority.

Ideal Candidate

The ideal candidate is:

  • A strategic thinker who understands how viral content ecosystems work
  • Comfortable working directly with clients and leading conversations
  • Data-driven and focused on measurable performance results
  • Able to design repeatable content systems that scale reach and engagement

Important: This Is NOT a Social Media Manager Role

  • This position is not focused on posting content or basic content creation.
  • We are specifically looking for a strategic growth leader, not:
  • Junior Social Media Managers
  • Canva-based content creators
  • TikTok editors or pure video editors
  • Influencers or creator-only profiles
  • Entry-level agency founders
  • Anyone focused solely on editing or posting content

Pay: $1,500.00 - $2,500.00 per month

Application Question(s):

  • Do you have experience in client success, account management, or customer success?
  • Do you have experience in content strategy, social media management, or creative strategy?

Work Location: Remote
